backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features for the internal dashboard, including partner level dropdown, AsistenmuDashboardSection component, and Superadmin role access, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Asistenku React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with all routes split between a PublicLayout (home, portals, registration) and AppLayout (client, partner, and internal dashboards), wrapped in a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/Closing.tsx: Simple centered closing section displaying a single quality-assurance statement for the Asistenku landing page.
frontend/src/components/ConversionStatem: Centered landing page section with two statements explaining Asistenku's service unit conversion philosophy.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with the Asistenku icon, copyright text, and navigation links to WhatsApp concierge, internal login, and partner portal.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with the Asistenku logo, desktop navigation (Layanan anchor, Daftar, Masuk), and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Two-column hero section with a bold two-line heading, description text, CTA buttons for smooth-scroll service selection and WhatsApp contact, and a hero image.
frontend/src/components/HowWeSupport.tsx: Centered landing page section listing the four-step process of how Asistenku supports clients, with a closing summary statement.
frontend/src/components/JoinTeam.tsx: Centered call-to-action section inviting users to join the Asistenku team with a button linking to the partner information page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Dashboard: A layout shell for dashboard pages that accepts a custom header and children, wrapping them in a full-height flex column with a fixed footer.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCards.tsx: Renders a 2-column accordion grid of four service tier cards (TENANG, RAPI, FOKUS, JAGA), each showing an emoji, title, short description, price, and expandable full description.
frontend/src/components/TimelyDelivery.t: A simple static section component displaying a centered heading and paragraph about timely, parallel task execution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file for future backend query hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds utility classes for brand teal and navy colors.
frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.tsx: A minimal authenticated app layout that renders a full-height container with a TanStack Router Outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout that wraps pages with a shared Header and Footer around a TanStack Router Outlet.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx: A client registration form page with fields for name, email, WhatsApp, and optional company, where all inputs are disabled until the user clicks the Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/finance.tsx: Empty finance dashboard page file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.ts: Internal admin dashboard page that fetches and displays mock users, support tickets, and action history, with collapsible sections, filtering, and user management controls.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardClient.tsx: Client dashboard page showing active services, task summary counts, and a filterable task list with status badges, plus a modal for submitting new tasks, all rendered inside DashboardShell.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPartner.tsx: Partner dashboard page displaying mock partner profile, task summaries, and task lists grouped by phase (assigned, in-progress, revision, QA, history) with collapsible sections and filtering controls.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that composes the main marketing landing page by rendering Hero, HowWeSupport, TimelyDelivery, ConversionStatement, ServiceCards, JoinTeam, and Closing sections.
frontend/src/pages/InternalPortal.tsx: Internal portal page with Internet Identity login, a registration form, and a Claim Admin/Superadmin section, all gated behind login state.
frontend/src/pages/PartnerPortal.tsx: Partner portal page with Internet Identity login, a partner registration form (including city field), and a partner dashboard entry, all gated behind login state.
frontend/src/pages/TentangPartner.tsx: Informational page describing how Asistenku partners work, covering their workflow, level/verification system, transparent work standards, and a CTA to join as a partner.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the viewport to a DOM element by its ID using scrollIntoView.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the internal dashboard project at /dashboard/internal, documenting versioned features, architectural notes, role-based sections (AdminUser, Asistenmu, AdminFinance, Superadmin), and known issues.
